title: tragia adenophila var. mollis
intro: Tragia adenophila var. mollis, also known as soft Milkvetch or Tragia, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, which attributes it with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tragia adenophila var. mollis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its bioactive compounds. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
